domains.name: Active Directory Configuration
domains.explanation: This evaluates the security of your central user and computer management.

domains.name: Asset Management
domains.explanation: This evaluates how you track and manage your IT assets.

domains.name: Background Verification and Employee Awareness
domains.explanation: This assesses your personnel security and insider threat mitigation.

domains.name: Certifications
domains.explanation: This validates your commitment to industry-standard security practices.

domains.name: Change/Patch Cadence
domains.explanation: This evaluates how quickly you update systems to fix vulnerabilities.

domains.name: Dark Web Exposure
domains.explanation: This checks for leaked credentials or data on the dark web.

domains.name: Data Backup and Recovery
domains.explanation: This helps us understand recovery capability after an attack.

domains.name: DLP and DSPM
domains.explanation: This assesses measures to prevent sensitive data loss.

domains.name: Endpoint Security
domains.explanation: This evaluates protection of individual devices connecting to your network.

domains.name: Identity and Access Management
domains.explanation: This assesses how you control user access to systems and data.

domains.name: Incident Management and Response
domains.explanation: This assesses your readiness to respond to security incidents.

domains.name: IoT and OT Network
domains.explanation: This assesses security of connected devices and operational technology.

domains.name: Network Security
domains.explanation: This section assesses your first line of defense against external threats.

domains.name: Organizational Policies and Procedures
domains.explanation: This checks for established rules and procedures governing security.

domains.name: Physical Perimeter Security
domains.explanation: This assesses protection of physical assets and facilities.

domains.name: Ransomware Supplemental
domains.explanation: This section helps assess protection against ransomware.

domains.name: Regulatory Compliance
domains.explanation: This evaluates adherence to legal and regulatory security requirements.

domains.name: SOC and SOAR Capabilities
domains.explanation: This evaluates your real-time threat monitoring and automated response capabilities.

domains.name: Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Test
domains.explanation: This evaluates your proactive identification of security weaknesses.

questions.text: Is Active Directory (AD) auditing enabled?
Are service accounts managed with least privilege?
Do you maintain a comprehensive inventory of all assets?
Do you maintain Asset Criticality in inventory?
Do you maintain Asset Owner in inventory?
Do you maintain Asset Provisioning and EOL dates?
Do you follow a step-by-step approach for asset provisioning/deprovisioning?
Do you perform background verification of employees/subcontractors before onboarding?
How often are security awareness trainings conducted?
Is Password Management and MFA covered in training?
Is Social Media security covered in training?
Is Data Classification covered in training?
Is Phishing, Vishing, SMiShing covered in training?
Does applicant provide security awareness training to employees annually?
Does applicant use simulated phishing attacks to test employees?
Is your organization certified for ISO/IEC 27001?
Is your organization certified for NIST?
Is your organization certified for SOC 2?
Is your organization certified for HIPAA?
Is your organization certified for PCI DSS?
Are regular backups performed on critical systems?
Are backups encrypted during storage and transmission?
Are backup procedures tested regularly for recovery?
Is there a defined Recovery Point Objective (RPO) and Recovery Time Objective (RTO)?
Are cloud-based backups in place?
Are backups stored in geographically separate locations?
Is there a disaster recovery plan in place?
Are offline backups stored off-site in place?
Is RTO for critical systems <24 hours?
Is there a DLP solution implemented to monitor sensitive data?
How often is DLP policy reviewed and updated?
How frequently are dark web scans conducted?
Are dark web monitoring alerts reviewed regularly?
Is there a process to respond to dark web exposure?
Are endpoint devices configured with encryption?
How often are patches reviewed for endpoint devices?
Are mobile devices enrolled in a Mobile Device Management (MDM) solution?
Is there a process for securing and wiping lost/stolen devices?
Do all workstations have antivirus with heuristic capabilities?
Are endpoint security tools with behavioral detection deployed?
Is multi-factor authentication implemented for all critical systems?
How often are access rights reviewed?
Are privileged access accounts monitored using PAM solution?
Is there an account lockout policy for failed login attempts?
Are access permissions revoked immediately upon employee termination?
Is there an inventory of all IoT and OT devices connected to the network?
How often are IoT and OT network security assessments conducted?
Are there network segmentation strategies to isolate IoT and OT devices?
Is there monitoring of IoT/OT device communications?
Are default credentials changed on all IoT devices?
How is incident management and response process executed?
Are historical incident statistics maintained?
Is Firewall implemented?
Is DDoS Protection implemented?
Is WAF (Web Application Firewall) implemented?
Is IDS/IPS implemented?
Is NGFW (Next-Gen Firewall) implemented?
Are network segmentation and VLANs used to limit access?
Are VPNs used for secure remote access?
Is wireless network security implemented with encryption?
Is there a process to review the firewall rules?
How often do you perform review of network architecture?
Do you have a Cyber Crisis Management Plan?
Do you have an Information Technology Policy?
Do you have an Information Security Policy?
Do you have an Incident Management Policy?
Do you have a Data Protection & Privacy Policy?
Do you have a Business Continuity Plan (BCP)?
Is there a documented change/patch management policy?
Is target time to deploy critical patches <24 hours?
Is year-to-date critical patch compliance >90%?
Are physical security measures in place to protect data centers?
Are access control systems (keycards, biometrics, CCTV) implemented for secure areas?
Is there a policy for securing physical network ports?
Are intrusion detection systems in place for physical premises?
Are periodic physical security audits conducted?
Do you comply with applicable regulatory guidelines?
Are data protection laws (GDPR, DPDP) implemented?
Is there a documented data retention policy?
Are regulatory audit reports current?
Is phishing success ratio less than 15% on last test?
Does applicant tag/mark e-mails from outside the organization?
Is there a process to report suspicious e-mails to security team?
Is there a documented process to respond to phishing campaigns?
Does email filtering block known malicious attachments?
What is SOC monitoring capability?
Is there a mechanism for real-time alerting and escalation?
Is external reporting responsibility defined?
Is log monitoring conducted 24×7?
Are OT logs integrated where feasible?
Are alerts triaged with defined SLAs?
Is incident automation or playbooks used?
Do you have automated tools for periodic scanning of network components?
How often do you perform VA-PT assessment through external auditor?
Are identified vulnerabilities mitigated in a defined timeframe?
Is there a risk-based prioritization for vulnerability remediation?
